description: Detects blocking calls (std::fs, thread::sleep, .join()) inside async functions or async blocks in Rust. Simplified from Rust: flags all scoped calls (scoped_identifier in call position) without verifying async context containment. Cannot filter by specific std::fs:: / thread::sleep prefix.

flag.message: Scoped call detected -- verify this is not a blocking I/O call inside an async fn (e.g. std::fs::*, thread::sleep)
